calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-15-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Scott Hughes, #12365.

Robert Resner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, Successor-In-Interest to Collectronics, Inc.
Garry Looney, President for Creditors Trade Association Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Mary L. Xirouhakis, a/k/a Mary Louisexirouhakis, was filed on October 7, 2009.
Counsel for plaintiff informed that Court that defendants Antonios Xirouhakis, a/k/a Tony D. Xirouhakis, a/k/a Tony Xirduhakis, a/k/a Tony Xirovhakis, is deceased.
No other defendants remain in the case.

By Order of the Court, plaintiff's request for a Court Judgment against defendant Mary L. Xirouhakis, a/k/a Mary Louisexirouhakis is DENIED without prejudice.

Notice And Motion To Vacate Dismissal Pursuant To Ccp 473; Request For Judicial Notice
